title: ClickHouse normalizes JSON keys with dots, how to avoid?
description:
### Company or project name
_No response_
### Question
ClickHouse automatically converts keys with dots into nested objects. Is there a way to **store JSON with keys containing dots without this normalization**?
In ClickHouse 25.7.7:
```sql
CREATE TABLE test_json (data JSON) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_json VALUES ('{"a.b": 123, "c": {"d.e": 456}}');
SELECT * FROM test_json;
```
Output:
```
{"a":{"b":"123"},"c":{"d":{"e":"456"}}}
```
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_json_2 (id INTEGER, data JSON);
key_bug_features: Normalization of JSON keys with dots into nested objects
